caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with bold text and a cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hand as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion or storytelling session. The overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet professional recording setup.
